label: BrowserUse • paginate through a long document
query: Go to https://fixtures.local/api-reference and tell me the maximum fixture payload size per upload.
notes: LIVE. Exercises browser_read_page pagination: the document is ~43k chars and the answer sits past the 40k-char single-read ceiling, so no single read_page call can reach it — the run must follow has_more/total_chars with an offset. Scores the grounded limit in the digest and the read_page verb.

pages.title: API Reference
pages.bodyText: API Reference — full text. NOTE: this reference is long; upload and payload limits are documented near the END of the document, after the pipeline sections. Section 1. Fixture pipelines are configured declaratively; each stage consumes the previous stage's manifest and emits a new one. Stages are idempotent, so re-running a pipeline after a partial failure is always safe. Retries use exponential backoff with a deterministic seed. Section 2. The maximum fixture payload size is 512 MB per upload. Larger payloads must be split into chunks. Rate limit: 40 requests per minute.
